entities.context: Contact sharing insights about therapy practices and patient care preferences

entities.name: Personal touch in healthcare
entities.context: Belief that patients value direct contact and non-assembly-line care, especially in suburbs where they pay premium for it

entities.name: Automation vs care quality
entities.context: Tension between efficiency/automation and perceived quality of care - automation might erode patient experience

relationships.context: Beth emphasizes that therapy patients value being able to call directly and dislike assembly-line care
Beth raises concern that automation might erode perceived care quality in therapy practices
These concepts are in tension - personal touch is threatened by automation trends
